summary: Manual spec closeout refresh approved GH-170 Task Thread content migration spec at closeout carrier head c197c6b97d24b6a8ebdabd0c5fb7700b80c3204c. The spec is scoped to migrating existing #93/#94/#95 fixture content into the confirmed Codex-like shell while preserving WebEnvoy semantics for Task, Run, Evidence, Identity, Site Skill, and Harbor Session. It does not approve GH-171 fidelity QA, Stage 5, live Core/Harbor/Lode calls, real task submission, real run record truth, or real function/data contracts. Post-review drift after this record must remain limited to GH-170 review carriers or PR metadata.
reviewed_validation_summary: `npm run build` passed; `WEBENVOY_PACKAGED_SMOKE_SCREENSHOT=artifacts/gh-170-task-thread-migration.png npm run smoke:packaged` passed and produced a non-blank packaged screenshot. CodeGraph exploration completed before implementation for restored Codex thread layout / scroll / sticky footer and this repo's shell primitives.
follow_ups: After GH-170 merge/closeout, run GH-171 fidelity QA before closing parent #167.
Do not connect live Core/Harbor/Lode or treat fixture functions/data structures as real implementation contracts in this PR.
Future feature/data integration must still go through UI design, review, and walkthrough.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: The GH-170 spec, plan, implementation contract, task carrier, build evidence, evidence map, screenshots, and renderer changes all describe the same bounded fixture-content migration. The spec explicitly excludes final fidelity QA, Stage 5, live owner-runtime contracts, and real data contracts.

consumed_inputs.suite_validation: loom suite validate --target . --item GH-170 --json; loom suite carrier validate --target . --item GH-170 --json; loom suite evidence validate --target . --item GH-170 --json
consumed_inputs.scope_boundary: Task Thread fixture-content migration only; no GH-171 QA completion, no Stage 5, no live Core/Harbor/Lode, and no real function/data contract approval.
